action.reasoning: Observation: 3-model ensemble achieved 0.8539 test balanced accuracy (new best!). Few-shot is still weakest at 0.7797. Ensemble combines ConvNeXt (2 models) + ViT (1 model) with weights 0.5/0.4/0.1. Analysis: Adding architectural diversity should further improve the ensemble. ResNet50 is a different architecture (residual blocks but different from ConvNeXt) that could add valuable diversity. It's also fast to train (~25M params). With ~1.25h remaining, I can train ResNet50 and still have time for ensemble testing and eval submission. Decision: Train ResNet50 with balanced softmax + EMA, then test 4-model ensemble and submit eval.
